title: Hell on Wheels Netflix show is too violent

enrichment.summary: Kyle reviews the Netflix Western show Hell on Wheels, critiquing it for excessive and gratuitous violence while arguing the real Wild West was far less violent than depicted. He uses historical examples to support his point and reflects on the societal effects of normalizing on-screen violence, while admitting he is still watching the show.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: too gratuitously violent and not historically accurate
was far more law-abiding and civilized than pop culture portrays
hypocritical that violence gets a pass while nudity is censored
programs viewers, especially kids, to normalize and emulate violent behavior
should base outlandish events on real documented stories rather than invented gratuitous ones
enjoys the show's racial/social drama but feels guilty watching the violence
